title: AddrMode.addr_len: lookup table is fragile if enum values change
description: In python/src/lichen/link/frame.py, AddrMode.addr_len was changed from a dict lookup to a tuple lookup '_ADDR_LEN_TABLE[self]'. This assumes AddrMode enum values are 0, 1, 2, 3 in order. If enum values are changed or reordered, the tuple indexing will break silently or raise IndexError. Consider keeping the dict-based approach or adding a static assertion that enum values match expected indices.
close_reason: Added test coverage in tests/link/test_frame.py to verify AddrMode.addr_len lookup table correctness and values
